---
title: "Overview"
toc: true
---

## Conventions

[Conventions](../conventions/index.qmd) discusses frames, notation, quaternion representation, and sign conventions.

## Inputs

[Inputs](../inputs/index.qmd) discusses filenames, runtime selection, time properties, field schemas, field meanings, and dataset-specific edge cases.

## Synthetic GPS

[Synthetic GPS](../synthetic_gps/index.qmd) discusses ...

## Initialization

[Initialization](../initialization/index.qmd) discusses ...

## ESKF

[ESKF](../eskf/index.qmd) discusses ...

## API

[API](../api/index.qmd) discusses ...
